title: Agentic Workspace Proof Route Hints
description: Proof route lessons discovered during lifecycle setup/adopt or promoted from Memory. Candidate hints are not host policy; confirmed and negative lessons require provenance and owner routing.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying this payload as advisory proof route hints.

schema_version.description: Version of the proof route hints contract.

source.description: Repo-relative source path or setup phase that produced these hints.

rule.description: Human-readable safety rule explaining how consumers should treat these hints.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the policy that governs setup/adopt-learned proof route hints.

persistence.description: Declares that discovered proof routes are retained only as advisory hints, not authoritative proof policy.

authoritative_selection.description: Declares that current target capabilities remain authoritative when selecting proof commands.

configured_policy_role.description: Explains how configured proof policy relates to learned advisory hints.

route_map_decision.description: Prevents learned setup/adopt hints from becoming a parallel route map unless live discovery cannot select proof.

learning_policy.description: Policy separating setup/adopt-learned hints from live capabilities and configured proof policy.

hints.description: Proof command candidates or lessons. Candidate hints require live confirmation; confirmed Memory lessons may add proof candidates; negative Memory lessons suppress matching candidates.

items.description: One proof route hint or learned proof lesson discovered from repo-local surfaces.

id.description: Stable identifier for this discovered proof route hint.

state.description: Evidence state for this route lesson. Omitted legacy records are treated as candidate.

intent_type.description: Proof intent this command candidate may satisfy after live confirmation.

candidate_command.description: Command string discovered as a possible proof route.

source.description: Kind of repo-local surface where the candidate command or lesson was found.

source_path.description: Repo-relative file path that contributed this hint.

confidence.description: Advisory confidence level assigned by setup or adopt discovery.

requires_live_confirmation.description: Whether the candidate must be confirmed against current repo capabilities before command selection. Confirmed Memory lessons may set this false when provenance already establishes the route.

scope.description: Repo, path, tool, workflow, or surface scope where this lesson applies.

owner.description: Canonical owner surface for the lesson.

provenance.description: How this route was confirmed, disproved, observed, or promoted.

learned_at.description: ISO date or timestamp when this lesson was learned or last confirmed.
